capabilities.name: Flashcards
capabilities.description: 300+ Texas barber state board flashcards across 13 topics. Filter by topic, star weak spots.

capabilities.name: Practice Quiz
capabilities.description: Timed multiple-choice quiz — 20, 50, or 100 questions, randomized or by topic, scored with a per-topic breakdown.

capabilities.name: Practical Exam Guide
capabilities.description: Materials checklist and step-by-step instructions for every section of the Texas barber practical exam.

capabilities.name: Group Mode
capabilities.description: Live study rooms for a class — host creates a room, students join with a code.

pricing.free: Account required (Google sign-in); single-topic flashcards, quiz, and practical exam guide access.

paid.unlocks: Full multi-topic study and the complete 300-question bank.
